# Bankruptcy Dismissal Rate by District - 2026 Data
> Compare bankruptcy dismissal rates across all 94 federal districts. Data-driven analysis of Chapter 13 failure rates. 2026 update.

## About
dismissalrate.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Does Your Attorney Affect Your Chapter 13 Success Rate? - Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/attorney-impact.html
- Bankruptcy Rate - National Filing and Dismissal Statistics [2026] - Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/bankruptcy-rate.html
- Bankruptcy Dismissal Rates by Federal District - Find Your Court: https://dismissalrate.org/by-district.html
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy Dismissal Rates by State: https://dismissalrate.org/by-state.html
- Dismissal Rates - Central District of California: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/central-district-of-california.html
- Dismissal Rates - Eastern District of New York: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/eastern-district-of-new-york.html
- Dismissal Rates by District: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/
- Dismissal Rates - Middle District of Florida: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/middle-district-of-florida.html
- Dismissal Rates - Northern District of Georgia: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/northern-district-of-georgia.html
- Dismissal Rates - Northern District of Illinois: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/northern-district-of-illinois.html
- Dismissal Rates - Northern District of Ohio: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/northern-district-of-ohio.html
- Dismissal Rates - Southern District of Florida: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/southern-district-of-florida.html
- Dismissal Rates - Southern District of New York: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/southern-district-of-new-york.html
- Dismissal Rates - Western District of Missouri: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/western-district-of-missouri.html
- Dismissal Rates - Western District of Tennessee: https://dismissalrate.org/districts/western-district-of-tennessee.html
- The First-Year Drop - When Most Chapter 13 Cases Fail - Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/first-year-drop.html
- How to Check an Attorney's Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/how-to-check.html
- Bankruptcy Dismissal Rate by District - 2026 Data: https://dismissalrate.org/
- Your Bankruptcy Was Dismissed - What Are Your Options Now? - Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/recovery-options.html
- Voluntary Dismissal vs. Court-Ordered Dismissal in Bankruptcy - Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/voluntary-vs-court.html
- What a High Dismissal Rate Means: https://dismissalrate.org/what-it-means.html
- Why Do Chapter 13 Plans Fail? The Data Behind Bankruptcy Dismissals - Dismissal Rate: https://dismissalrate.org/why-chapter-13-fail.html
- Privacy Policy: https://dismissalrate.org/privacy.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
